headlines.title: Trump says he’s not thinking about Americans’ finances ‘even a little bit’ in Iran talks
headlines.description: President Donald Trump told reporters on Tuesday that he is not weighing the economic burden of the Iran war on everyday Americans when negotiating a deal with the country’s leadership

headlines.title: Tuesday’s primaries to set up key fall matchups in Nebraska
headlines.description: Tuesday’s primary elections in Nebraska will set the stage for November in a battleground House district, as well as a potentially competitive Senate contest, as Democrats try to win control of Congress.

headlines.title: Republican Rep. Tom Kean’s two-month absence continues as House returns
headlines.description: Republican Rep. Tom Kean of New Jersey, who has not voted in the House since March 5, will miss another week of work, his office told NBC News.

headlines.title: Dr. Marty Makary is out as FDA commissioner
headlines.description: Dr. Marty Makary resigned as commissioner of the Food and Drug Administration Tuesday, the fourth high-profile departure of a member of the Trump administration this year.“He’s a great doctor and he was having some difficulty, but he’s going to go on and he’s going to do well,” Trump said of Makary Tuesday afternoon.

headlines.title: Van Hollen questions FBI Director Patel about alleged drinking problems
headlines.description: During a Senate hearing, Sen. Chris Van Hollen, D-Md., and FBI Director Kash Patel got into a heated exchange over allegations about the director's drinking.

headlines.title: Dr. Marty Makary out as FDA commissioner
headlines.description: Dr. Marty Makary is out as FDA commissioner, according to two sources familiar with the matter, but it is unclear whether Makary NBC News’ Berkeley Lovelace Jr. reports on President Donald Trump’s frustration with Markary’s performance and his prior consideration to fire him.

headlines.title: Trump says he doesn't think about Americans' financial situation during Iran negotiations
headlines.description: President Trump told reporters that he doesn't think about Americans' financial situations during negotiations about the war with Iran. "Not even a little bit," he said, emphasizing that he only thinks about Iran not acquiring a nuclear weapon.

headlines.title: The cage match is on for tickets to Trump’s UFC fight at the White House
headlines.description: 4,000-plus spectators who are lucky enough, cunning enough or rich enough will score a seat to the UFC fight on the South Lawn next month.

headlines.title: How the White House Correspondents’ Association dinner chaos unfolded
headlines.description: Secret Service faced challenges evacuating President, Vice President, Cabinet officials and Congressional leaders after gunman rushes D.C. gala.

headlines.title: Pentagon considering re-naming Iran war ‘Sledgehammer’ if ceasefire collapses
headlines.description: The U.S. military is considering officially re-naming the war with Iran to “Operation Sledgehammer” if the current ceasefire collapses

headlines.title: GOP Rep. Jen Kiggans faces backlash for agreeing with ‘cotton-picking’ comment about Hakeem Jeffries
headlines.description: Rep. Jen Kiggans, a Virginia Republican, is under fire after she agreed with a comment that Hakeem Jeffries should get his “cotton-picking hands off of Virginia.”

headlines.title: Map: How much you pay in federal and state gas taxes
headlines.description: As national gas price averages head toward $5 per gallon, one state has already suspended its gas tax, and now President Donald Trump and his Cabinet are talking about doing the same.
